en: Do you want to hold one? Just be sure to cradle their necks when you...
Oh, no, that's not necessary.
They don't bite. Worst case, you get a few poop pellets in your hands.
ko: 물지 않아요. 최악의 경우 손에 똥 몇 알 묻는 정도.

en: Making it worse. Okay, no, I'm not even going to be touching these things.
ko: 더 안 좋아졌네. 아뇨, 이것들 만지지도 않을 거예요.

en: They could just go way back in the trunk.
Yeah, that's not going to work.
What?
Rabbits need space and air flow. You can't just toss them in a trunk.
ko: 토끼는 공간과 환기가 필요해요. 트렁크에 넣으면 안 돼요.

en: Sorry, I misspoke. It's not a trunk. It's obviously a hatchback.
ko: 죄송, 말 잘못했어요. 트렁크가 아니라 해치백이에요.

en: Looks smaller than a trunk.
It's a $10,000 car. You get what you pay for, okay? Can you work with me here?
ko: 만 불짜리 차예요. 돈값 하는 거야. 좀 협조해줄래요?

en: They really need to be spread out in the car with you.
Ooh, that'll be even cuter.
Yeah, I'm sure it will. I just, uh...
I just have a little thing with, um...
rodents.
So, you know, just basically hate, hate all of them.
ko: 그러니까 기본적으로 다 싫어, 전부 다.

en: All of them? What about Mickey Mouse?
What adult likes Mickey Mouse story other than f****** freaks?
ko: 미친 놈 말고 어떤 어른이 미키마우스를 좋아해?

en: If this doesn't work, I'll pack them up.
No, no, no, no, no, no. It's, uh...
You know, it's the big entrance, so that's, uh...
I just put the f****** rats in the car.
